title: gnaphalium supinum subsp. hoppeanum
intro: Gnaphalium supinum subsp. hoppeanum, also known as a subspecies of the White Cudweed plant, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gnaphalium supinum subsp. hoppeanum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
